title: Functions should be declared explicitly
description: Functions should be declared explicitlyAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misrabad-practicecertWhy is this an issue?More InfoThe use of prototypes enables the compiler to check the integrity of function definitions and calls. Without prototypes the compiler is not obliged to pick up certain errors in function calls (e.g. different number of arguments from the function body, mismatch in types of arguments between call and definition).
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Function is called without explicit declaration. Functions should be declared explicitly before use.
